items.title: A Vibe Is Not a Verdict: I Built a Tool That's Allowed to Say 'I Don't Know'
items.summary: My gut screamed scam. My tool said 'I don't know' — and that refusal is what actually cracked the case. An experiment in why honest CLIs beat confident ones.
